title: Dark Patterns ABM: replication package
description: Replication package for an agent-based model (ABM) of trust erosion caused by dark patterns on a digital platform, accompanying the manuscript submitted to Technology in Society. A single deterministic entry point (reproduce.py) runs seven scenarios over many random seeds and re-generates every table, figure, and data product reported in the paper. The package bundles a pinned environment (requirements.txt / requirements.lock / environment.yml / Dockerfile) so results reproduce exactly on the same code and dependency versions. NOTE: before publishing this deposit, add each creator's ORCID via the 'orcid' field in the creators list (e.g. "orcid": "0000-0000-0000-0000"); placeholders are intentionally omitted here so no fake identifier is recorded.
